nasb.text: My eye will show no pity nor will I spare. I will repay you according to your ways, while your abominations are in your midst; then you will know that I, the Lord, do the smiting.

esv.text: And my eye will not spare, nor will I have pity. I will punish you according to your ways, while your abominations are in your midst. Then you will know that I am the Lord, who strikes.

cnv.text: 我的眼必不顧惜，我也不憐恤。我卻要按著你的行為， 照著你中間可憎的事報應你， 你們就知道擊打你們的是我耶和華。

ccb.text: 我必不顾惜你，也不怜悯你，我必按你的恶行报应你。这样，你就知道惩罚你的是我耶和华。
